_comment: Minimal Coupa OAuth scopes CIB needs for all master-data imports plus invoice export. Empirically derived by probing each CIB endpoint with single-scope tokens. Coupa keys scope to the API's owning domain, not the object name (e.g. tax_codes -> common.read, tax_registrations -> invoice.read). Keys are the required scopes; values name the datasets each unlocks (used to make a missing-scope error actionable). This set is a property of the CIB release version; long-term it should ship inside the CIB release itself so it cannot go stale relative to the deployed hooks.
